name: Bavarian Sausage Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 tablespoon Mustard, prepared  (Djon or Gulden Type)
recipeInstructions:
Mustard must be the strong Djon or Gulden Type.
1. Cut the knockwurst into small cubes.
2. Mince the pickles and onion.
3. Mix together the vinegar, mustard, and oil in a bowl.
4. Add salt, pepper, paprika, and sugar to the mixture. Adjust seasonings if desired.
5. Stir in the capers and chopped pickles and onions.
6. Just before serving, stir in the chopped parsley and mix well.
